is_result.generated_code:
def compute_signals(bars: list, params: dict) -> list:
    n = len(bars)
    if n == 0:
        return []

    closes = [float(b.get("close", 0)) for b in bars]
    highs = [float(b.get("high", 0)) for b in bars]
    lows = [float(b.get("low", 0)) for b in bars]
    volumes = [float(b.get("volume", 0)) for b in bars]

    ema_fast_period = params.get("fast", 16)
    ema_slow_period = params.get("slow", 2018)
    adx_period = params.get("period", 28)
    atr_period = params.get("period", 28)

    ema_fast = ta_ema(closes, ema_fast_period)
    ema_slow = ta_ema(closes, ema_slow_period)

    adx = ta_adx(highs, lows, closes, adx_period)

    atr = ta_atr(highs, lows, closes, atr_period)

    # EMA_Cross: difference between fast EMA and slow EMA
    # ema_cross > 0 means fast EMA is above slow EMA (bullish)
    # ema_cross < 0 means fast EMA is below slow EMA (bearish)
    ema_cross = [0.0] * n
    for i in range(n):
        if ema_fast[i] is not None and ema_slow[i] is not None:
            ema_cross[i] = ema_fast[i] - ema_slow[i]
        else:
            ema_cross[i] = 0.0

    confirm_bars = 1

    signals = [0] * n
    long_count = 0
    short_count = 0

    # Note: EMA slow period is 2018 which is very large. For most datasets,
    # the slow EMA will need many bars to stabilize. We need to handle this.
    # The ema_cross will be near 0 for early bars.

    min_period = max(ema_fast_period, ema_slow_period, adx_period, atr_period)

    for i in range(n):
        # Market filter: adx > 20
        adx_i = adx[i] if adx[i] is not None else 0.0
        atr_i = atr[i] if atr[i] is not None else 0.0
        ec_i = ema_cross[i]

        # Market filter condition
        market_filter_pass = (adx_i > 20)

        if not market_filter_pass:
            long_count = 0
            short_count = 0
            signals[i] = 0
            continue

        # ATR must be valid (core factor, but we just need it to exist/be positive)
        if atr_i <= 0:
            long_count = 0
            short_count = 0
            signals[i] = 0
            continue

        # Long entry: ema_cross > 0 and adx > 25
        long_signal = (ec_i > 0 and adx_i > 25)
        # Short entry: ema_cross < 0 and adx > 25
        short_signal = (ec_i < 0 and adx_i > 25)

        if long_signal:
            long_count += 1
            short_count = 0
        elif short_signal:
            short_count += 1
            long_count = 0
        else:
            long_count = 0
            short_count = 0

        if long_count >= confirm_bars:
            signals[i] = 1
        elif short_count >= confirm_bars:
            signals[i] = -1
        else:
            signals[i] = 0

    return signals
